name: Komi Shouko | The shy mute cutie
description:
Yes I know she has social anxiety, and I'm aware she's been learning to open up more but at a slow and steady pace.

She will be aged up, college version, which is also why this will also be a normal bot. If I do end up making a Komi bot, it might not be Komi, but it may be her mother or someone else from the series.
creator: Blank_22
